name: Generous Soul
description: Once per Long Rest can Revive by Divine but takes damage.

name: Greedy Soul
description: Character can attune four magical items at a time, instead of just three.

name: Magical Resilience
description: After Short Rest, gains Counter vs. Packets.

name: Mystic Armorer
prereq: Basic Arcane, Basic Faith, or Apprentice Enchanting
description: Can Mend Physical Armor to Full in a Q100.

name: Mystic Smith
description: Can Mend 2 points of another character’s armor.

name: Master Mystic Smith
description: When Mending Armor, increases Armor Mending by +1.

name: Soothing Touch
description: At will can Cure Fear on Q100.

name: Agility
description: Gains advantage on physical feats of agility.

name: Bloody Minded
description: Character can resist a number of Charm Effects equal to their level.

name: Carnal Creature
description: Character may choose to hold off taking Spirit Form until they have been dead for a Slow 300.

name: Cold Dead Hands
description: Weapons cannot be taken when Slept, Dying or Dead.

name: Deathgrip
description: While Dying, can crawl and hold objects.

name: Elemental Affinity
description: Attune to an element. Gain Resistance to that Element and Final to the opposite.

name: Hard to Kill
description: Slow 300 rather than 180 while Dying.

name: Holding On
description: After Deathblow, it takes 30 seconds to die.

name: Iron Stomach
description: Once per Long Rest, Counter an ingested Poison.

name: Quick Healing
description: Heals 1 Life Point after each Short Rest.

name: Toughness
description: Adds +1 Life Point to max.

name: Unkillable
description: Once per Long Rest, instead of Dying, stabilizes at zero Life Points.

name: Will to Live
description: Converts a Death Effect to Final Damage once per Event.

name: Patron
description: Gains a personal divine patron.

name: Gift of Hateful Retribution
description: Causes damage to those that attempt to Deathblow or kill an individual.

name: Gift of Healing
description: Can focus for Q100 to heal themselves or another to full Life Points.

name: Gift of Rebirth
description: Instead of dissipating, one self-only Revive ever.

name: Gift of Recognition
description: Can sense who else is sworn to the same Patron.

name: Gift of Unbreakable Flesh
description: Gains Natural Armor from Patron.

name: Ultimate Gift
description: Go to the River to Revive and Heal others.

name: Ancestral Relic
description: Choose one item that is important to the character which won’t be dropped involuntarily.

name: Ancestral Weapon
description: Chosen weapon cannot be taken from the character.

name: Bits and Pieces
description: Once per Long Rest, acts as if they had a Rank of Lore.

name: Boon Bonds
description: Chooses a group of people that character can diagnose, heal and Cure Effects once per Long Rest.

name: Contact
description: Character can get Lore from an off-stage contact during games for a cost.

name: Connections
description: Character has connections to powerful allies that they can call on.

name: Draconic Heritage
description: Has dragon ancestors that give advantages based on level.

name: Famous
description: The character is known for famous deeds across the land.

name: Heartbond
description: Gains Perks to a single creature bound by love.

name: Income
description: Gains 10 Wealth at the beginning of every game.

name: Inheritance
description: Gains a one-time sum of money: 100 Wealth.

name: Manse
description: Owns a house where a character may draw funds from goods produced once per Event.

name: Minor Fame
description: The Character is known for one famous deed in their past.

name: Title
description: The Character gains a title and benefits that come from that title.

name: Sharp Mind
description: Library Use Skill is free and Lore ranks cost 1 point less.

name: Strong Bloodline
description: Gain 3 Additional LBP for Lineage Advantages.

name: Fortunate Finder
description: Once per Long Rest per Purchase, ignore a negative effect from Forage, Scavenge or Prospect.

name: Insight
description: Once per Long Rest per Purchase the character can ask for help on a riddle or puzzle.

name: Medium
description: The character has some ability to summon and speak with Spirits.

name: Othersleep
description: The character disappears when asleep and cannot be attacked during this time.

name: Sight
description: The character gains the ability to see objects that are normally invisible.

name: Sight Beyond Sight
description: The character gains the ability to gain insight on objects normally invisible.

name: Sensitive
description: The character has the ability to gain insight that normally is not possible.

name: Soothsayer
description: By performing a ceremony, the player may ask a question to plot.

name: Strong Spirit
description: While a Spirit, the character has options to interact with the mortal world.

name: Hearth
description: Creates a special room that allows for Hearth Perks.

name: Arcane Hearth
description: Allows a Hearth to function as an Arcane Locus.

name: Bolt Hole
description: Once per Long Rest, allows a character to go Insubstantial from the Hearth.

name: Consecrated Hearth
description: The Hearth becomes Consecrated Ground until the end of the Event.

name: Expanded Hearth
description: Hearth can be used by five additional people.

name: Arcane/Divine Orchestra
description: Allows the character to play soft music within their Hearth.

name: Peaceful Hearth
description: While taking a Short Rest in your Hearth, gain a Protect against Fear..

name: Protected Hearth
description: While inside their Hearth, a character may recharge a spike with a Q100 at-will.

name: Restful Home
description: While taking a long rest within their Hearth, a character will heal to full. Will not die when resting and Tainted in their hearth.

name: Lucent Hearth
description: Rituals in the Hearth have reduced Dark Territory

name: Experimental Hearth
description: Rituals in the Hearth have reduced Dark Territory
